snippet.title: MAHALINI - UNTUK YANG BERSAMA NYA (OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Mahalini Raharja kembali mencuri perhatian lewat salah satu lagu terbarunya yang berjudul “Untuk Yang Bersama Nya.” Lagu ini menjadi salah satu track yang paling menyentuh hati dalam album tersebut, menggambarkan perasaan rindu, kehilangan, dan ketulusan cinta yang abadi meski telah terpisah oleh jarak dan waktu.

Diciptakan oleh Andmesh Kamaleng dan Mahalini, lagu  “Untuk Yang Bersama Nya” menggambarkan situasi dimana seseorang yang pernah hadir begitu berarti kini telah pergi, namun kehadirannya tetap hidup dalam doa dan kenangan. Melalui lirik yang lembut dan penuh perasaan, Mahalini menyampaikan pesan bahwa cinta sejati tidak selalu harus dimiliki — terkadang cukup untuk dikenang dan diikhlaskan dengan doa.

Dibalut dengan aransemen pop balada yang tenang dan menyentuh, “Untuk Yang Bersama Nya” menonjolkan karakter vokal Mahalini yang kuat namun lembut, menyalurkan emosi dengan penuh penghayatan. Lagu ini seolah menjadi perjalanan batin seseorang yang berusaha berdamai dengan perpisahan, menghadirkan kedamaian di tengah kesedihan yang mendalam.

Mahalini mengungkapkan bahwa “Untuk Yang Bersama Nya” merupakan salah satu lagu yang paling personal di album KOMA,. Ia menulisnya bersama Andmesh di saat sedang berada dalam fase reflektif terhadap kehidupan dan makna cinta. “Buat aku, lagu ini adalah bentuk keikhlasan. Terkadang kita tidak bisa terus bersama seseorang yang kita cintai, tapi doa dan kenangan akan selalu jadi cara kita untuk tetap bersama mereka — walau hanya dalam hati,” ujar Mahalini.

Album KOMA, sendiri menjadi simbol perjalanan emosional Mahalini sebagai seorang musisi dan manusia. Setelah sebelumnya dikenal lewat lagu-lagu penuh cinta dan makna seperti “Sisa Rasa” dan “Mencintaimu,” kali ini Mahalini menghadirkan karya yang lebih dewasa. “Untuk Yang Bersama Nya” menjadi salah satu lagu yang memperlihatkan kedewasaan musikal dan spiritual Mahalini dalam bermusik.

Lagu ini sudah tersedia di platform musik kesayangan kalian dan sudah bisa kalian dengarkan secara terus menerus.

Listen Now!

#mahalini #untukyangbersamanya #koma, #musicvideo

[Verse]
Aku berjalan dalam waktu,

Mencoba kuat tanpa dirimu,
Tanpa bahumu, tanpa pelukmu

Kau tempat aku mengadu,
Tempat kuluapkan sedihku
Meski kini kau tlah pergi jauh,
Jujur ku masih, ingin bertemu

[Chorus]
Meski ragamu menjauh
Hatimu tinggal bersamaku
Walau lama tak denganmu, hadirmu masih doa ku
Kuluangkan banyak waktu mengingat yang lalu – lalu

Tempat kuluapkan sedihku
Meski kini kau tlah pergi jauh,
Jujur ku masih, ingin bertemu

[Chorus 2]

Walau lama tak denganmu, hadirmu masih doa ku
Kuluangkan banyak waktu mengingat yang lalu – lalu

[Bridge]
Berat langkah ini sungguh berat semua tanpamu
Biar ku kenang dalam cinta besarnya kasihmu

[Chorus 3]

snippet.title: Aftershine - Legan (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Alhamdulillah..

Telah rilis single terbaru kami berjudul "Legan".
Lagu ini bercerita tentang seseorang yang sudah jatuh cinta dengan tulus, menjadi tempat bersandar saat pasangannya terluka dan kesepian. Menjadi seseorang yang hadir sepenuhnya, mendengar setiap cerita, menenangkan hati, dan memberi rasa aman tanpa pamrih.

Namun pada akhirnya ia sadar, kebersamaan itu hanya sementara.. ia hanyalah pelampiasan, pengisi sepi sebelum orang lain datang menggantikan. Di tengah luka dan kekecewaan, ia memilih pasrah dan berusaha mengikhlaskan walaupun rasa sayang itu sebenarnya belum benar-benar hilang.

snippet.title: ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
Straw Hats! Grab your crew! ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE sets sail on March 10th!

MORE INFO ON ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE:
Netflix’s epic high-seas pirate adventure, ONE PIECE, returns for Season 2—unleashing fiercer adversaries and the most perilous quests yet. Luffy and the Straw Hats set sail for the extraordinary Grand Line—a legendary stretch of sea where danger and wonder await at every turn. As they journey through this unpredictable realm in search of the world’s greatest treasure, they’ll encounter bizarre islands and a host of formidable new enemies.

ABOUT ONE PIECE:
Netflix’s live-action adaptation of ONE PIECE is based on Japan’s highest-selling manga series of all time by Eiichiro Oda, with over 100 volumes and 500M copies sold worldwide. The epic high-seas adventure follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to find the legendary fabled treasure, the ONE PIECE, and become King of the Pirates. The beloved franchise has a vast, multigenerational global fan base. Upon its debut in 2023, the Netflix live-action series became a global phenomenon, spending eight weeks on the Global Top 10, reaching #1 in over 75 countries and making history as the first Netflix English-language series to debut at #1 in Japan. The show has nearly 100M views and is one of Netflix’s most downloaded shows of all time. ONE PIECE was nominated for 11 awards at the Children’s & Family Emmy Awards, including Outstanding Young Teen Series. The beloved adaptation offers fans ways to engage year-round, off-screen with a brand new immersive experience set to open at Netflix House and fans can bring the world of the live-action show into their everyday lives with products like LEGO, Moose Toys and more at Netflix Shop and retailers worldwide. ONE PIECE returns for its highly anticipated second season in 2026, and has been renewed for Season 3. The show is created in partnership with Shueisha and is produced by Tomorrow Studios (an ITV Studios partner) and Netflix.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81218765

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

snippet.title: KASUS!! Insiden Maling Brainrot Los Strawberry Elephant 😭😭😭 | Survive Lava for Brainrots Indonesia
snippet.description:
KASUS!! Insiden Maling Brainrot Los Strawberry Elephant 😭😭😭 | Survive Lava for Brainrots Indonesia

Nama Game : Survive Lava for Brainrots
Link Game : https://www.roblox.com/games/119987266683883

🔰 Sekarang kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat VOICE di Room Santuy yang ada di Discord. Jadwal ga tentu, tapi biasanya kalau sore sekitar jam 15.30 - 16.30 WIB. Baca lagi bagian bawah biar kalian benar-benar mengerti 🗿

Sebelum JOIN, tolong baca ini ya 🙏😁
✅ Izin sama orang tua & tanya boleh ga install dan main Discord? Btw, discord punya aturan kalau mau buat akun mesti umur 13+
✅ PENTING!! Ikut MABAR atau RECORD mungkin agak susah karena ramai yang tungguin bang Hayo, sedangkan game Roblox server-nya terbatas
✅ Record juga GA SELALU MABAR  karena beberapa game ga boleh rusuh & mesti diatur sebaik mungkin
✅ Kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat voice "Room Santuy" di discord
✅ Ga bisa ADD karena sudah full. Satu-satunya solusi adalah FOLLOW akun Roblox bang Hayo dan nanti kalian bisa JOIN bang Hayo main. Lalu, kalau bang Hayo lagi AFK atau SERVER sudah penuh, teman-teman ga bisa join ya
✅ Kadang bang Hayo harus pakai LINK PRIVATE SERVER biar record-nya lebih lancar. Kirim link-nya di Discord & untuk cara JOIN baca di cara-ikut-record yang ada di Discord
✅ Baca PERATURAN GROUP & PERTANYAAN UMUM  di Discord untuk kepentingan bersama
✅ Di group ini kalian juga bisa mencari KAWAN yang mungkin cocok sama kalian dan bisa main bareng. Ga perlu fokus sama bang Hayo saja karena bang Hayo ga mampu standby 24 jam
✅ Mohon pengertiannya kalau ga berhasil JOIN bang Hayo karena server sudah FULL & sistemnya siapa cepat dia masuk dulu

🔰 Bang, kenapa ga bisa chat di Discord?
Untuk menjadi MEMBER di Discord, teman-teman harus tulis username Roblox yang AKTIF di nama-roblox & baca bagian peraturan-server

🔰 Bang, CARA JOIN gimana ya?
Bang Hayo sudah jelasin secara lengkap di Discord. Cari saja di channel cara-ikut-record biar kalian paham. Lalu, akun yang umurnya kurang dari 13 tahun akan agak sulit buat join karena peraturan terbaru Roblox

snippet.title: Daniel Caesar - Who Knows (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Daniel Caesar - Who Knows
Daniel Caesar - Who Knows (Lyrics)

✅ Follow Daniel Caesar
https://DanielCaesar.lnk.to/SonOfSpergy

Lyrics

[Verse 1]
I'll probably be a waste of your time, but who knows?
Chances are I'll step out of line, but who knows?
Lately, you've set up in my mind
Yeah, girl, you, and I like that

[Chorus]
Lately, I've been thinking that perhaps I am a coward
Hiding in a disguise of an ever-giving flower
Incompetent steward of all of that sweet, sweet power

[Verse 2]
Yesterday was feeling so good, now it's gone
I'd feel like that always if I could, is that wrong?
Tell me 'bout the city you're from
Is it hot? Does it snow there?

[Chorus]
Lately, I've been thinking 'bout my precarious future
Will you be there with me by my side, my girl, my shooter?
Who's to say who calculates? Not me, I'm no computer

[Bridge]
Is it a crime to be unsure? (Let me know, let me know, let me know, let me)
In time we'll find (Let me know, let me know, let me know, let me)
If it's sustainable (Let me know, let me know, let me know, let me)
You're pure, you're kind (Let me know, let me know, let me know, let me)
Mature, divine (Let me know, let me know, let me know, let me)
You might be too good for me, unattainable (Let me know, let me know, let me know, let me)

[Outro]
Maybe we get married one day, but who knows?
Think I'll take that thought to the grave, but who knows?
I know that I'll love you always
Yeah, girl you, and I'd like that

snippet.description:
Taylor Swift - Enchanted (Lyrics)
🔥 Help us reach 50,000 subscribers!

👉 Taylor Swift:
https://www.instagram.com/taylorswift

×=×=×=×=×   

Lyrics for "Taylor Swift - Enchanted"

[Verse 1]
There I was again tonight
Forcing laughter, faking smiles
Same old tired, lonely place
Walls of insincerity, shifting eyes and vacancy
Vanished when I saw your face
All I can say is, it was enchanting to meet you

[Verse 2]
Your eyes whispered, "Have we met?"
'Cross the room your silhouette
Starts to make its way to me
The playful conversation starts
Counter all your quick remarks
Like passing notes in secrecy

[Pre-Chorus]
And it was enchanting to meet you
All I can say is, I was enchanted to meet you

[Chorus]
This night is sparkling
Don't you let it go
I'm wonderstruck
Blushing all the way home
I'll spend forever
Wondering if you knew
I was enchanted to meet you

[Verse 3]
The lingering question kept me up
2AM, who do you love?
I wonder 'til I'm wide awake
And now I'm pacing back and forth
Wishing you were at my door
I'd open up and you would say, "Hey"

[Pre-Chorus]
It was enchanting to meet you
All I know is I was enchanted to meet you

[Chorus]
This night is sparkling
Don't you let it go
I'm wonderstruck
Blushing all the way home
I'll spend forever
Wondering if you knew
This night is flawless
Don't you let it go
I'm wonderstruck
Dancing around all alone
I'll spend forever
Wondering if you knew
I was enchanted to meet you

[Guitar Solo]

[Bridge]
This is me praying that
This was the very first page
Not where the storyline ends
My thoughts will echo your name
Until I see you again
These are the words I held back
As I was leaving too soon
I was enchanted to meet you

[Breakdown]
Please don't be in love
With someone else
